brand.name: BookedOnCall
brand.tagline: AI call answering for trades businesses
brand.description: BookedOnCall answers inbound calls for home-service businesses, qualifies the caller, captures lead details, and can book or route follow-up based on the business configuration.

validatedCapabilities: Answers inbound calls for trades businesses using a configured AI assistant.
Captures caller name, phone number, job details, and callback information.
Checks scheduling availability against the configured provider when the business has enabled scheduling.
Supports Jobber and Google Calendar integrations when a business connects and configures those accounts.
Delivers call summaries and booking outcomes in your BookedOnCall dashboard.
Queues SMS or email follow-up flows when the business configuration enables those channels.

integrations.name: Jobber
integrations.description: BookedOnCall can use Jobber as a scheduling provider and can sync eligible bookings through the configured Jobber connection.

integrations.name: Google Calendar
integrations.description: BookedOnCall can check availability against Google Calendar and write bookings back when the business has connected a supported calendar account.

plans.name: Starter
plans.summary: For small teams that want default assistant setup, call coverage, lead capture, and supported scheduling.
features: Inbound call answering and lead qualification
Callback capture and team handoff support
Scheduling against the configured provider when enabled
Jobber or Google Calendar integration when connected
Default assistant setup with standard voice and greeting

plans.name: Pro
plans.summary: For teams that want more included minutes plus branded assistant voice and behavior controls.
features: Inbound call answering and lead qualification
Callback capture and team handoff support
Scheduling against the configured provider when enabled
Jobber or Google Calendar integration when connected
Give the assistant a custom name
Customize the greeting and assistant behavior
